messages.content: i hv said what I needed to
Suit yourself
None of the above elements are there
Rant means to speak or complain about something in a loud, angry and rather confused way
Baap re koto likhte paro
If people dont like us thats their problem.

I love the way my country is - with is greatness and flaws and if in some small way we can remember lessons of the past and keep the country safe and protected and united there is development thats all.

Whether we are good bad ugly, we love our community and I bear no hatred against any other community because every community comes with its strength and weakness and together we make this country colourful, wonderful, diverse and culturally rich. I simply love India and that is why I never agreed to or felt the wish to relocate to other countries even though I and options especially being in IT. So I love the way my community is and love the way my country is and I truly do. I never target any community and will not have anyone targeting mine and I love
Look its my FB messenger you are posting on ...where you are ranting about Bengalis. Not ok with me. Your opinion , your right but your opinion is strictly that.
And entitled to feel so
I accept that they are above and superior to rest of humanity
Anyway let's buy peace never thought u wud react so much rather then see thru the point being made
I never said I dislike Bengalis don't know how u come to that conclusion
This is pvt 1 21 chat not on yr wall
Another thing - even if we debate on political issues, please do maintain the boundary and not attack my community on my FB . Eve in social media we must adhere to rules.

As I said, I am not your counsellor/therapist. If you dislike Bengalis its your business. It makes no difference to me. I just find it unacceptable that I have to see such comments on my FB messenger or on my digital page when I am on FB . Rest you can kepp your viewpoints to yourself. Ad dont tell me what is wrong. You are not my mentor or duru to tell me how I should think about my community. My parents and my family and my education have given me enough sense and self esteem and culture and knowledge to decide for myself.

My notion is mine. What has it got to do with you? I am a proud Bengali and will be so. Does it hurt you? What is this habbit of your of attacking and targeting Bengalis? Isnt this hate mongering? Isn't this being intolerant? Doyou think I care what your issue is with Bengalis? Do you think my emotions and feelings about y community  is subject to your viewpoints and do you think it makes an ounce of impact and tahht it will change based on your opinion?

Secondly can you tell me why I have to read/hear your opinion on Bengalis early in the morning or late at night when I am on to FB? Isnt that unacceptable? Its i a stress on me to read your constant ranting against Bengalis and you therefore cause mental stress by this behaviour. I do not agree with your viewpoint. But neither do I impose my viewpoint on you. Why do you do that?dont think thats acceptable.
Anyway the strong sentiment doesn't allow u to see the obvious
Not imposing or anything just correcting yr notion
But I do not impose my opinio on you.

Whats you feel wrong is your thought. Makes no difference to me. I dont go and hammer my ideas on to you. You as an individual have the right to think for yourself as do others. I am not here to live up to your expectations not are you here to live up to mine. If you have dee rooted hatred/dislike for Bengalis its your problem. I am not here to cure and analyse teh reason.
"The Bengali in Joe Bidenâs cabinet" https://www.getbengal.com/details/the-bengali-in-joe-bidens-cabinet
It was arun Majumdar didn't happen that's why the lack of euphoria
It's just that the order u hv suggested is wrong it's not indian 1st

OUr political choices have hurt us. But we havent gone to target any other community or exploit any other community. We are and will remain a good and great community. We need to pick ourselves up again. Hope we make right political choice this time. By the way every community in India and around the world have gone through the cycle of high glories and then a slide. Its part of the cycle of universe. It happens. There is a lesson in everything that happens. But in the process of that cycle the pride in one;s identity and root, and in our case  it is Indian+Hindu+Bengali must be and must remain strong.

I have till date never seen you praise even one thing about Bengalis. Only targetting them with negative remarks. This is not done. Unacceptable. YOu can go on doing that for the rest of your life but it wont affect me. I will only become more convinced that your rantings are due to some deep rooted dislike and anger against Bengalis. That is not healthy.

Please stop targetting Bengal and Bengalis. There is one Bengali... Aru or some similar name. But thats not the point. Have you ever seen me constantly ranting against any community?  I dislike it. And when it comes to my own community we have so many glaringly good things that why anyone should talk only negatively is somethig beyond me. I have till date seen you praising even one thing about Bengalis. I too could choose to pick up negative pieces of other communnities, yes every other community but I dont becaue I believe that none of us are perfect and together we make up theis great country India.
That's whah I write against
But if there was anyone fro the Bengal out state wud gone berserk
We don't even know to which state they belong
People of Indian origin part of Joe biden team
Lohiapawan@gmail.com
I will be away for a while. Will revert bk later based on your response. Thanks
or you can share your email id and I can send you a mail to explain

If you are ojay with it
CAn you pls share your ph nbr? I can then call you and explain
HI
If u can be more specific or tell me the objective will be able to help better
I know someone in keventer/metro dairy
For example
Mr. Lohia do you know anyone senior in a company which is part of Food processsing Industry?

Look up your ow comments. My impression is absed on may comments over many months and on many shares or discussions wherever Benga and Bengali related topics are there. Reatrce your steps/ I dont have time to collate and convince you.
but will be grateful if u cud share the instances where I hv done what u allege so that I can at least remove those postings
sure even i dont wish to
fine. Lets stop this debate and try to get Bengal to elect BJP and lets try to do something good for Bengal, in every which way, no matter how small. I will not discuss this topic any more

i wish u can share at a couple of instances where I hv demeaned or mocked or belittled Bengalis except pointing out that they make rank bad political choices for decades whulich u also agree and also they go gaga over a global achievement of a Bengali irrespective of his zilch contribution to the state.

U hv assumed that calling our wring political choices is mocking which I hv never done.anyway u r entitled to yr assumptions facts be damned. A mistake is understandable but to keep making the same mistake for 43 years and with every chance if repeating it in 2021 is foolishness. Now if calling out this foolishness means anti Bengali mocking hanging a sword so be it.

Thats my honest opinion about what I want even when I want BJP in Bengal. I want leaders who know and respect the value of Bengal and Bengalis and understand and nurture teh culture. Take it or leave it.

Fine. But befroe you debate about political mistakes note taht throught out the world historically everything is a political mistake - IN India allowing Congress to rle for 70 years is a political mistake. In Germany allowing Hitler is a political mistake. In China Mao is a political mistake. In Russian Lenin and Stalin are political mistakes, In Argentina Eva Peron is a political mistake IN Israel Golada Meiir is a olitical Mistake. It all depends on a phas ein history when they were considered important and later the very same phase were considered a mistake. It perspective of one set of people over another. COmmunism is a big political mistake. But the truth is in the context of flowing time, as per law of universe, every thing has a value because t teaches lesson, it is important for a particular stage and phase.  As the saying goes o one is a person of such foresigh that they dont make mistake. If you think you hav ereached a point in life and look back to regret on mistakes that is wrong- whatever you did was right because it enables to reach a other point and teach you the lesson. So yes deliberate cruelty on people is a crime but when people choose a leader or a party with belief ofsomething good that is not a mistake at that tme, even though later based on consequences it may be a mistake. SO yest allowing 34 years to CPM is a mistake but it cannot be a mistake to hold a sword over the ehad of Bengalis and cal them names and mock them.More over many non Bengalis in Benga have contributed to Bengal and integrated well andenriched Bengal like Harsh Neotia or many before him. But if someone mocks and demeans Bengalis and blames them and questions them why they are proud to be Bengais I would never trust such a person with power. For example if you were a BJP leader I would not want you because you humiliate and mock Bengalis and lack undertanding and respect for Bengalis.

so how can it irritate me
So if my claim of being Bengali irritates you, but even I claim to be a Bengali as much as u do

Yes my community. I am proud INdian and I am a proud Bengali and I am a proud Hindu. We have multiple identities. I am not giving up anyone because each is important to me and I am a reesult of all these. My sensibilities, my sens eof art cultire cuisine and upbringing is Bnegali even though my family is world travelled and have been all over India. So if my claim of being Bengali irritates you, its your problem. I am not here to make you happy. You are no even a close friend You are just a social media acquaintance thru Roopenda and MInal. Thats it. I cherisha nd treasure all the identes that make me who I am even the fact that my Missionary school and corporate world and world travel shaped me. I am grateful for every though and experience and yes I am proudly Indian Bengali and HIndu.

I don't disagree on the point of wrong choice. I disagree and debate because you refuse to understand in the historical and geographical and political context why they made the choice. You may be born in Bengal but my ancestors faced atrocities by Muslims in East Bengal and my family and extended family lost lot of land. My father lost his father when he was 3 years and had to cross over to seek shelter with relatives and lost all property and a lot of relatives. My maternal grandfather and his brothers lost juge land and property. Later many decades later my Mama ji faced brutal beatings during Naxal movement and a brilliant student that he was his health was affected. A cousin faced the same and died later. So partition and its terrible aftermath cost Bengal heavily. Bengal contributed max in Freedom struggle my grandfathers brothers were involved as Freedom Fighters, but due politics by Nehru Gandhi Bengal suffered maximum. When you break a communities back but srill we rise and contribute so much it is something to be proud of. Anyway I disagree with you attempt to needlessly humiliate and critcize Bengali community. But if you talk in a logical sensible and balanced manner I have no reason to disagree unless of course I have a different perspective and viewpoint. We can disagree without being disagreeable. If you are disagreeable and hurt my community by mocking I WILL fight tooth and nail with logic but wont use  a sword.
seems like u only diagree with me on wrong choices made by people of bengal on all other things we r on the same page
You sent an attachment.

Sure everyone is entitled to his/her views.

look lets dtop that discussion. I operate on a certain positive vibration and I would not want to dwell on a negative viewpoint. I objected because I do not find is acceptable. But keep on trying to justifying it with several anecdotes and example and yet I do not find t acceptable or justifiable or logical Period. No community shows consistent upward high state contribution. In India we have the great Marathi community, the Rajputs , The Assamese , the, Tamils, but they have neither faced the continuous neglect and challenge that Bengal has and although they too have contributed in many direction and many fields I will say Bengal has been and is continuing to be a high contributor in all fields, So should I bash them? Should I nash the Marwari community for only contributing in trade and commerce? No. Thats no India.No. Yes the state is languishing but making constant sarcastic and derogatory comments do not project you in a positive light. Even if you are a 4rd generation Bengali by domicile, let me tell you even if my old child or a family member made insensitive remarks like you did I would have not accepted or tolerated that. Because your remark smacks of prejudice and without taking into consideration of the historical events and real contributions. I have realize we may not agree and that is why I just avoided and kept quiet. I dont want to stay in this vibration. SO I will not respond on this topic any further. I know Bengali history and culture and the root causes and I will make my own opinions based on facts.

Rajat Gupta, one of the worldâs most prominent Indian-born business leaders, has been warned by a US judge that he cannot beat insider trading charges by trumpeting his history of philanthropy any more than Mother Teresa could use her missionary work to fend off bank robbery charges.

âIf Mother Teresa were here and charged with bank robbery, the jury would still have to determine whether or not she committed the robbery,â US district judge Jed Rakoff said at a pre-trial hearing in a Manhattan court.

New York, May 18 (PTI): Rajat Gupta, one of the worldâs most prominent Indian-born business leaders, has been warned by a US judge that he cannot beat insider trading charges by trumpeting his history of philanthropy any more than Mother Teresa could use her missionary work to fend off bank robbery charges.

âIf Mother Teresa were here and charged with bank robbery, the jury would still have to determine whether or not she committed the robbery,â US district judge Jed Rakoff said at a pre-trial hearing in a Manhattan court.
